items.text: PA State Police @PAStatePolice · 15h WATCH LIVE: Our PSP Memorial Day Ceremony, where we are honoring the service and sacrifice of Corporal Timothy J. O’Connor Jr., and paying tribute to all PSP Troopers who lost their lives in the line of duty.
